name: Remote: Clear Text Application Usage based on Flows
notes: Detects flows to or from the Internet where the application type uses clear text passwords.  This may include applications such as Telnet, FTP, etc.
bb_references: BB:Policy Violation: Compliance Policy Violation: Clear Text Application Usage
conditions_text: when the flow context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
when a flow matches any of the following BB:Policy Violation: Compliance Policy Violation: Clear Text Application Usage
when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
TD_list: APPLY Remote: Clear Text Application Usage based on Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow context is Local to Remote, Remote to Local
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:Policy Violation: Compliance Policy Violation: Clear Text Application Usage
AND when a flow matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Successful Communication
RED_list: Event name: Policy: Remote: Clear Text Application Usage
Event description: Detects flows to or from the Internet where the application type uses clear text passwords.  This may include applications such as Telnet, FTP, etc.
